name: 🌐 Global View
description: Full system overview showing all components and their connections

name: ▶️ Video Playback
description: What happens when a user presses Play — from API request to video stream delivery

steps.description: Client sends play request to Zuul Gateway
Zuul routes to API/BFF service for content resolution
API service checks EVCache for content metadata and DRM license
On cache miss, fetches from Cassandra and populates cache
Play event published to Kafka for analytics and recommendations
Client receives stream manifest and begins adaptive bitrate playback via Open Connect CDN

name: 🧠 Recommendation Pipeline
description: How Netflix generates personalized content recommendations using ML and real-time event data

steps.description: User interactions (views, ratings, browsing) are captured by client apps
Events flow through Zuul and API services to Kafka
Recommendation engine consumes event streams from Kafka in real-time
ML models read user profiles and viewing history from Cassandra
Generated recommendations are cached in EVCache for fast retrieval
When user opens the app, API services fetch personalized rankings from cache
